name: Easy Italian Pasta Salad
directions: Cook both boxes of pasta as directed.
Drain and rinse with cold water to cool.
Drain very well once again.
Dice ingredients that need it.
Add everything to a large bowl; mix well and cover.
Refrigerate for at least 4 hours so the flavors can be absorbed.  I refrigerate mine overnight.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Shells With Tomatoes, Arugula and Parmesan

name: Colorful Seashell Salad
directions: Cook pasta according to pkg. drain & rinse in cold water.
In large serving bowl, mix together the pasta,tomatoes,bell pepper,cucumber & onion.
In a small bowl whisk together: sugar,oil,ketchup,vinegar,salt,paprika & pepper till smooth. Toss with pasta mixture. cover & refrigerate until very well chilled.
prep. time does not include chilling time.

similar.name: Shells With Tomatoes, Arugula and Parmesan

name: Sweet Sour Cucumber Noodle Salad
directions: Coat drained noodles with oil while they are still warm.
Mix together sugar, Ac'cent, salt, vinegar, garlic powder, parsley flakes, dry mustard and pepper.
Add noodles.
Add cucumber and onion.
Make at least 4 hours before serving or let set overnight.
May double vegetables.

similar.name: Shrimp Pasta Salad With Dill and Parsley

name: Krab Pasta Salad
directions: Boil pasta until al dente.
Rinse under sink in cool water,until pasta is cool to the touch. Drain well.
Mix in all your remaining ingredients in a VERY large bowl,or divide everything into 2 large bowls. Chill covered 1-2 hours,and serve.

name: Weight Watchers BLT Pasta Salad
directions: In a large bowl mix together shell, bacon, tomatoes, and lettuce.
In a small bowl mix the sugar, vinegar, mayo, sour cream and mustard, salt and pepper to taste.
Pour over shell mixture, stir and chill.

similar.name: Shrimp Pasta Salad With Dill and Parsley

name: Antipasto Pasta Salad
directions: Cook pasta according to package directions; drain. Rinse with cold water to cool quickly.
In large bowl, toss cooled pasta with remaining ingredients until well blended.
Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.

name: Stuffed Shells
directions: Preheat oven to 325 degrees.

Cook pasta al dente according to pasta package directions. Make sure not to over cook the pasta.  Otherwise it will not be easy to fill and will fall apart.  Drain and rinse with water so that pasta does not stick together.
In large bowl, beat eggs lightly.  Then add ricotta, mozzarella, spinach, butter, salt and pepper.  Mix until well blended.
Fill the shell pasta with the cheese mixture.  Set aside.
Put a thin layer of spaghetti sauce on the bottom of a 9x13 baking dish.  The arrange filled shell pasta on top.
Pour remaining spaghetti sauce on top.  Sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
Cover with foil and bake for 30 minutes.
NOTE:  Consider foil lining your baking dish for easy clean up.  When entertaining, assemble this dish but don't bake until just before serving.  Can be made the night before.

similar.name: Fak'n Bacon, Feta & Spinach Stuffed Shells
Shells With Tomatoes, Arugula and Parmesan

name: Shrimp Pasta Salad With Dill and Parsley
directions: In a large bowl, combine the pasta shrimp, peas, onions and parsley.
In a small bowl, combine the yogurt, mayonnaise, lemon juice, dill, salt and pepper.
Pour over pasta mixture and toss gently.
Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours before serving.

name: Ranch Peanut Pasta Salad
directions: Cook, drain and run pasta under cold water until completely chilled.
Place pasta in large serving bowl.
Dice cheese into cubes and add to chilled pasta.
Add peanuts to pasta.
Pour Ranch dressing over the pasta, peanuts and cheese.
Mix well.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.

name: Weight Watchers Stuffed Shells
directions: Preheat oven 375.
Cook shells until al dente, rinse and set aside.
Mix cheeses, salt, garlic powder, oregano and pepper.
Spread a few spoonfuls of tomato sauce on bottom of 9x13 dish.

When shells are cool enough to handle, fill each shell with cheese mixture and place in baking dish.  When all shells are in dish, spoon remaining tomato sauce over shells.  Cover pan and bake for 20 minutes.  Yields about 4 shells per serving.
Servings  6.

similar.name: Fak'n Bacon, Feta & Spinach Stuffed Shells
Shells With Tomatoes, Arugula and Parmesan

name: Shells With Tomatoes, Arugula and Parmesan
directions: Cook pasta in a large saucepan of boiling salted water until al dente, about 10 minutes; drain.
Rinse with cold water and drain again.
Whisk the oil, vinegar, lemon juice, salt and pepper to blend; set aside.
Combine the pasta, tomatoes, arugula, bell pepper, Parmesan, basil, and parsley; toss to blend.
Add dressing and toss again before serving.

similar.name: Fak'n Bacon, Feta & Spinach Stuffed Shells

name: Dilled Pasta Salad
directions: Cook pasta according to directions.
Add the next three ingredients.
Combine the mayo, vinegar and dill and add to other ingredients.
Stir, and refrigerate until chilled.

similar.name: Shrimp Pasta Salad With Dill and Parsley

name: Easy Cheesy Pasta Pot
directions: Cook the pasta for 4 minutes.
Add the frozen veggies and continue cooking for another 4 minutes after it returns to a boil. (Cook until the pasta is the way you like it).
Drain the water from the pot.
Add the butter and velveeta cheese.
Add the milk and stir until cheese has melted.
Pour into a serving bowl and top with the onions. (optional).
Enjoy!

name: Fak'n Bacon, Feta & Spinach Stuffed Shells
directions: Boil the shells until al dente & set aside.
Cover the bottom of a casserole dish with sweet pepper and onion spaghetti sauce.
Mix all other ingredients in a large bowl.
Spoon mixture into shells.  Place open-side down in casserole.
Cover will sauce & bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.

similar.name: Shells With Tomatoes, Arugula and Parmesan

name: Seafood Salad Stuffed Shells
directions: Boil shells in plenty of water until just done.  Allow them to cool completely and discard any broken ones.
Chop peppers and add to the seafood salad.  Break up any large pieces of seafood.
Fill each shell with salad mixture.
Sprinkle with Old Bay Seasoning as a garnish if you wish.

similar.name: Fak'n Bacon, Feta & Spinach Stuffed Shells

name: Ww Chicken Pasta Salad
directions: Combine first 6 ingredients in a large bowl; toss well.
Combine vinegar and next 7 ingredients in a small bowl; stir well.
Pour dressing over pasta mixture; toss gentle.
Cover and chill at least 2 hours.

name: Macaroni Salad
directions: Cook pasta al' dente, according to directions.  Rinse with cold water and drain very well.
In a large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, vinegar, mustard, sugar, salt and pepper.
Add bell pepper, olives and cheese, tossing well with dressing to coat well.
Serve chilled--best after it's had a chance to meld, at least 2-3 hours.

name: Pine Nut Pasta Salad
directions: Cook the pasta shells until done to desired firmness.
Drain pasta, running under cold water until pasta is cool.
Slice 4 or 5 artichoke hearts into small pieces.
Slice the grape tomatoes in halves (or smaller if desired).
Add pasta, olives (drained), artichoke hearts, and tomatoes into a large   bowl.
Slowly mix in 3 tablespoons of olive oil.  Mix thoroughly.
Add salt and pepper to taste.
Refrigerate for about 2 hours until cold.
Serve!

similar.name: Shells With Tomatoes, Arugula and Parmesan

name: Super Easy Pasta Salad
directions: boil the pasta according to the box.
while pasta is boiling chop up your red and green onion.
in a mixing bowl mix together your mayo and the packet of hidden valley ranch salad dressing mix.
toss in the frozen peas, red onion and green onion and set aside.
when the pasta is done drain and run it under cold water to cool the noodles completely.
when the past is cool add it to the mixing bowl and mix until all the pasta is covered
cover and chill in the fridge - usually about 3 hours and it is sooo good the next day.

similar.name: Shrimp Pasta Salad With Dill and Parsley

name: Curried Fruit & Pasta Salad
directions: Cook pasta according to directions, drain.
Combine miracle whip and seasonings in a small bowl.
Toss the pasta and seasonings together, then add grapes and chicken.
Gently stir in mandarin oranges last so that they don't get too broken up.
Refrigerate until chilled, enjoy!

similar.name: Shrimp Pasta Salad With Dill and Parsley

name: Napkin Dumpling
directions: Mix together all ingredients (except the cinnamon and sugar) to form a ball. Moisten a linen napkin with cold water and tie the ball of dough in it. Simmer 40 to 50 minutes in salted boiling water, remove from napkin, sprinkle well with cinnamon and brown sugar, and serve.

name: Walnut and Roasted Fennel Pasta
directions: Fennel  --  Heat the oven to 400.  On a small baking sheet, line with either foil or parchment and add the fennel and drizzle with some olive oil, salt and pepper.  Roast for 15 minutes until it starts to brown and it begins to soften.  Not too soft - you still want it slightly crisp. Remove and keep warm.
Sauce  --  Mix the walnuts, parsley, ricotta, garlic, salt and pepper to taste.
Pasta  --  Cook according to directions.  Drain and set to the side, but keep warm. Reserve a little of the pasta water to thin out the sauce just a bit.

Combine  --  In a large bowl, add the ricotta sauce and the fennel to the pasta and mix well. If you would like the sauce a bit thinner, just add a little of the pasta water.  Garnish with some fresh parsley, walnuts and even fresh grated parmesan if you want.  ENJOY!

similar.name: Shells With Tomatoes, Arugula and Parmesan
Fak'n Bacon, Feta & Spinach Stuffed Shells

name: Macaroni Casserole
directions: Mix cooked macaroni and cheese in a sauce pan over low heat until cheese melts.
Stir in remaining ingredients into macaroni/soup mixture.
Pour into greased baking dish and bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes.

name: Waldorf Pasta Salad
directions: Cook the pasta according to the directions on the package and drain. Rinse under cold water, then drain again.

Combine the pasta and all other ingredients, except the salt, in a bowl and toss gently until the pasta is evenly coated and all ingredients are blended. Season with salt, to taste. Cover and chill for at least five or ten minutes before serving.

name: White Sauce Alfredo Seafood Thing
directions: cook the pasta.
mix in the remainder of ingredients.
salt & pepper to taste.
simmer and reduce until creamy.

similar.name: Shells With Tomatoes, Arugula and Parmesan
